notes: Non-profit professional organization for automation and control engineering. Joint publisher with IEC of the ISA/IEC 62443 series (OT/ICS cybersecurity). ISA also publishes its own standards (e.g., ISA-95 for enterprise/control integration). Paywalled at isa.org. Note: distinct from ENX's `isa` match_node (which abbreviates 'Information Security Assessment' for VDA-ISA — different sense of the acronym).

match_nodes.description: ISA 62443 — joint with IEC (Security for industrial automation and control systems)

data.official_name: ISA/IEC 62443 - Security for Industrial Automation and Control Systems
data.notes: Paywalled. ISA edition of the joint ISA/IEC 62443 series. Technical content matches the IEC edition (see secid:control/iec.ch/62443); ISA sells its own bound copies and certifies the related ISA Secure program. Authoritative reference is typically the IEC numbering.
